spec.name: The Great Eastern Desert
spec.description: A vast desert stretches for miles, the sands constantly shifting around you. A pyramid lies to the south. The gates of a city lie a short distance off to the north.

north.description: Some city gates stand off to the north.

east.description: Sand as far as the eye can see.

south.description: Sand as far as the eye can see.

west.description: Sand as far as the eye can see.
